subject: Recover OpenTargets GO merge
description: Profile and fix the target+GO scratch ingest performance regression, then rerun scratch validation and promote only if validated.
result: Recovered and merged OpenTargets target+GO. Optimized dedup_edges fast path for no-evidence edge tables; pathway_contains_gene write dropped from stuck CPU loop to 8.6s. Promoted nodes/gene.parquet, nodes/pathway.parquet, and edges/pathway_contains_gene.parquet. GCS validate PASS: 3,233,849 nodes, 25,325,918 edges, total_dangling_edges=0, peak RSS about 6.3G.
